panels.description: Wide establishing shot of the grand Netherfield estate exterior, elegant carriage arriving, Miss Lucas and her sisters stepping out, lush English countryside, soft sunlight, historical regency era style.

bubbles.text: The visit to Netherfield had begun, a social obligation etched in the patterns of their lives.

panels.description: Medium shot inside a drawing room, Mrs. Bennet looking annoyed and restless in the background, Jane smiling warmly while interacting with the younger Lucas sisters, ornate Regency furniture.

bubbles.text: This whole affair is truly intolerable.

panels.description: Medium close-up of Elizabeth watching Jane across the room with a knowing, observant expression. Jane stands near Mr. Darcy, looking demure and guarded.

bubbles.text: She keeps her heart so well-guarded, yet her eyes follow him.

panels.description: Close-up of Charlotte Lucas whispering into Elizabeth's ear, looking earnest and concerned, detailed period costumes, soft indoor lighting.

bubbles.text: If she conceals her affection too well, she risks losing him altogether.

panels.description: Medium shot of Elizabeth sitting alone by a window, pensive expression, looking out at the gardens, silhouette against the light, reflective mood.

bubbles.text: To love without encouragement... it is a dangerous path indeed.
